projectDescription: The reference P4 software switch — a C++ framework for building and testing P4-programmable switch architectures.
keyFeatures: Interprets compiled P4 JSON to implement programmable packet processing pipelines
Multiple target architectures: simple_switch (v1model), simple_switch_grpc (P4Runtime), psa_switch (PSA)
Runtime control plane via Thrift CLI (simple_switch_CLI) or P4Runtime gRPC API
Built-in support for counters, meters, registers, action profiles, and action selectors
Packet replication engine with multicast, cloning/mirroring, resubmit, and recirculate
Interactive P4 debugger (p4dbg) with breakpoints and watchpoints
Event logger broadcasting parser/table events over nanomsg
Extensible via custom extern objects and dynamically loaded shared libraries
Mininet integration for multi-switch topology testing
Support for P4_14 and P4_16 programs (v1model and PSA architectures)
publicApiSurface: simple_switch — main software switch binary (v1model / P4_14)
psa_switch — Portable Switch Architecture target binary
bm_sim C++ library — core simulation building blocks (match tables, parser, pipeline, PHV)
bm::Switch — base class for implementing custom bmv2 targets
bm::ExternType — base class for implementing custom P4 extern objects
BMv2 JSON format — compiler output consumed by all bmv2 targets
